heading: Advisory committees; prohibition of consideration of political affiliations
label: 217a–1 Advisory committees; prohibition of consideration of political affiliations
text: All appointments to advisory committees established to assist in implementing the Public Health Service Act [ et seq.], and the Comprehensive Alcohol Abuse and Alcoholism Prevention, Treatment, and Rehabilitation Act of 1970 [ et seq.], shall be made without regard to political affiliation.42 U.S.C. 201142 U.S.C. 4541So in original. The comma probably should not appear.1
notes: References in TextThe Public Health Service Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to this chapter (§ 201 et seq.). For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.act July 1, 1944, ch. 37358 Stat. 682section 201 of this titleThe Comprehensive Alcohol Abuse and Alcoholism Prevention, Treatment, and Rehabilitation Act of 1970, referred to in text, is , , , which is classified principally to chapter 60 (§ 4541 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 91–61684 Stat. 1848section 4541 of this titleDec. 31, 1970
CodificationSection was not enacted as a part of the Public Health Service Act which comprises this chapter.
Amendments2010— struck out “the Mental Retardation Facilities and Community Mental Health Centers Construction Act of 1963,” after “Public Health Service Act,”.Pub. L. 111–256
